---
title: "Florence Tickets & Booking"
subtitle: "Days 3–6 · June 7–10"
categories: [planning, florence, tickets]
toc: true
---

Advance booking is essential for Florence's major museums in June. The Uffizi and Accademia sell out weeks ahead on summer weekends — book both as soon as your dates are confirmed.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Refreshing this data

Run `python3 scripts/ticket_agent.py` from the project root to re-scrape all booking pages, then re-render the site to update these pages.
:::

{{< include tickets-florence.md >}}
